messages.content: Make a ROBLOX game called “Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!” with the storyline like this: I the game based on the show, a special group of friends who can turn into super-cat-girls and cute kittens. They use their powers to fight a bad spirit named ANUBIA who lives underground. order to save the world, they've got to first find the ANUBIA GEMSTONE from which Anubia's spirit has escaped, free the SPIRIT CATS from the evil spell they're under - collecting the magic from their gems and returning them to regular cats and finally imprison Anubia back in her gemstone and close the portal to the underworld... If they don't succeed it will stay open and the planet will be doomed.

Welcome to "Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!" where you can join a group of special friends who possess the ability to transform into super-cat-girls and cute kittens with extraordinary powers. Together, you must embark on a thrilling adventure to save the world from the malevolent spirit named ANUBIA, who threatens to bring destruction to the planet.

In order to thwart Anubia's evil plans, you must first track down the ANUBIA GEMSTONE from which her spirit has escaped. Along the way, you will encounter SPIRIT CATS who have been ensnared by Anubia's dark magic. By collecting the magic from their gems and freeing them from the spell, you will gain valuable allies in your quest to defeat Anubia.

Your ultimate goal is to reseal Anubia within her gemstone and close the portal to the underworld, ensuring that she can no longer wreak havoc on the world. Only by working together and harnessing the power of friendship and courage can you hope to succeed in this epic battle against darkness.

Are you ready to unleash your Kitti Power and save the world from imminent destruction? Join the adventure in "Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!" now!

The superhero group team (Kitti Katz): Kitti Katz are a group of three heroines who are willing to protect the world from evil forces.

- Members
- Current members:

- Tabitha
- Shakia
- Azami

Meet the fearless trio of heroines known as Kitti Katz, a special group of friends who are dedicated to using their Kitti Power to protect the world from evil forces. Here are the current members of the team:

1. Tabitha: Tabitha is the leader of the Kitti Katz, known for her quick thinking and strategic planning. She has the ability to transform into a powerful super-cat-girl with incredible agility and strength. With her natural leadership skills, Tabitha guides the team through dangerous challenges and inspires her teammates to never give up.

2. Shakia: Shakia is a fierce and determined member of the Kitti Katz, known for her fiery spirit and unwavering loyalty to her friends. When she transforms into a super-cat-girl, Shakia gains the power of fire, using it to fend off enemies and protect her teammates. With her strong sense of justice, Shakia will stop at nothing to ensure that evil forces are defeated.

3. Azami: Azami is a compassionate and kind-hearted member of the Kitti Katz, known for her healing abilities and intuitive nature. When she transforms into a cute kitten, Azami possesses the power of healing, providing support and comfort to her teammates in times of need. With her empathetic spirit, Azami brings balance and harmony to the team, reminding them of the importance of compassion and empathy in their mission to save the world.

Together, Tabitha, Shakia, and Azami make up the courageous and unstoppable team of heroines known as the Kitti Katz. With their unique powers and unwavering determination, they stand ready to face any challenge and protect the world from dark forces. Join them on their epic journey in "Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!" as they fight to save the planet from imminent destruction.

Tabitha’s physical appearance: For her casual outfit, she wears a form fitted tank top with triangles and circles. Unerneath that, she wears a black tank top that is also form fitted. For pants, she wears denim jean shorts with belt buckle, and long black leggings underneath. She wears some accessories, like earrings and her Kitti necklace. Tabitha also wears pink shoes with velcro straps. She sometimes pairs her casual outfit with a light yellow jacket with white and pink lining and a hood. For her Warrior Cat outfit, she wears black armor with golden and pink details on her feet, knees, elbows, and more. She has black half-gloves, and she wears the necklace Meeyah gave the Kitti Katz. She has long pink nails that are like claws, and cat ears, along with whiskers.

Tabitha, the fearless leader of the Kitti Katz, possesses a striking physical appearance that reflects her confidence and strength. Here are the details of her casual outfit and Warrior Cat attire:

Casual Outfit:
- Form-fitted tank top with geometric patterns of triangles and circles
- Black tank top underneath for added layering
- Denim jean shorts with a stylish belt buckle
- Long black leggings for extra comfort and flexibility
- Accessories include earrings and her signature Kitti necklace
- Pink shoes with velcro straps for easy wear
- Occasionally pairs her outfit with a light yellow jacket with white and pink lining and a hood

Warrior Cat Outfit:
- Black armor adorned with golden and pink details on her feet, knees, elbows, and more
- Black half-gloves for added protection and agility
- Wears the mystical necklace given to the Kitti Katz by Meeyah
- Adorned with long pink nails that resemble fierce claws
- Sports cat ears and whiskers as part of her transformation into a powerful Warrior Cat

With her eye-catching fashion sense and unique style, Tabitha's appearance reflects her inner strength and determination as a leader of the Kitti Katz. Whether she's in her casual attire or Warrior Cat outfit, Tabitha exudes a sense of power and grace that inspires her teammates and strikes fear into the hearts of their enemies. Join Tabitha and the rest of the Kitti Katz on their thrilling adventures and witness her incredible transformation into a mighty Warrior Cat as they fight against evil forces to save the world.

Shakira’s physical appearance: Kia has a dark complexion, yellow/gold eyes, and bold green to yellow hair, usually tied up into a braided ponytail with stands hanging off. Her color scheme is green.

Outfits

For Kia's casual outfit, she wears a mint-green no sleeved top with darker green pants with two stripes by her knees. For her shoes, she wears white sneakers with green soles. Her hair is styled into a messy ponytail and she has yellow glasses. She sometimes pairs her casual outfit with a teal colored jacket with some white stripes. For her Warrior Cat outfit, she wears black armor with golden and pink details on her feet, knees, elbows, and more. She has black half-gloves, and she wears the necklace Meeyah gave the Kitti Katz. She has long green nails that are like claws, and cat ears, along with whiskers.

Shakia, known for her fiery spirit and fierce determination, possesses a captivating physical appearance that reflects her vibrant personality. Here are the details of her physical appearance and outfits:

Physical Appearance:
- Dark complexion that exudes strength and confidence
- Striking yellow/gold eyes that convey her inner intensity
- Bold green to yellow hair styled into a braided ponytail with loose strands hanging off
- Color scheme dominated by shades of green, symbolizing her connection to nature and power

Casual Outfit:
- Mint-green sleeveless top that complements her vibrant personality
- Darker green pants with stylish stripes near her knees for a touch of flair
- White sneakers with green soles for comfort and agility
- Messy ponytail hairstyle that adds to her dynamic and energetic look
- Yellow glasses that add a pop of color and individuality
- Optional teal-colored jacket with white stripes for added style and warmth

Warrior Cat Outfit:
- Adorned in black armor with intricate golden and pink details on her feet, knees, elbows, and more
- Black half-gloves for added protection and agility in battle
- Wears the mystical necklace bestowed upon the Kitti Katz by Meeyah
- Long green nails that resemble sharp claws, ready for combat
- Features cat ears and whiskers as part of her transformation into a formidable Warrior Cat

With her bold appearance and vibrant energy, Shakia is a force to be reckoned with as a member of the Kitti Katz team. Whether she's in her casual attire or donning her Warrior Cat outfit, Shakia's fierce and spirited nature shines through, inspiring her teammates and striking fear into the hearts of their enemies. Join Shakia and the rest of the Kitti Katz on their daring quest to save the world from evil forces, and witness her remarkable transformation into a powerful Warrior Cat as they face their greatest challenges head-on.

Azami’s physical appearance: Zami has a tan complexion, blue hair and a medium build. She has brown eyebrows and eyes, and she usually wears casual and simple outfits. Her color scheme is blue.

Outfits

For her casual outfit, she wears a long sleeve top with blue stripes on the top. Her pants are more teal than a light blue color, and they are usually jeans. She usually pairs her outfits with a blue beanie that can be slipped on easily. She sometimes pairs her casual outfit with a blue jacket with a hood. For her Warrior Cat outfit, she wears black armor with golden and pink details on her feet, knees, elbows, and more. She has black half-gloves, and she wears the necklace Meeyah gave the Kitti Katz. She has long blue nails that are like claws, and cat ears, along with whiskers.

Azami, with her serene nature and calming presence, possesses a gentle yet determined physical appearance that reflects her inner strength. Here are the details of her physical appearance and outfits:

Physical Appearance:
- Tan complexion that radiates warmth and tranquility
- Blue hair that adds a touch of uniqueness to her appearance
- Medium build that conveys her balance and poise
- Brown eyebrows and eyes that exude kindness and wisdom
- Color scheme dominated by shades of blue, symbolizing her connection to peace and harmony

Casual Outfit:
- Long-sleeve top with stylish blue stripes on the top for a subtle yet fashionable touch
- Teal-colored jeans that offer comfort and versatility in movement
- Blue beanie that can be easily slipped on for a casual and carefree look
- Occasionally pairs her outfit with a blue jacket with a hood for added warmth and style

Warrior Cat Outfit:
- Adorned in black armor with intricate golden and pink details on her feet, knees, elbows, and more
- Black half-gloves for protection and agility in battle
- Wears the sacred necklace gifted to the Kitti Katz by Meeyah
- Long blue nails that resemble sharp claws, ready for combat
- Features cat ears and whiskers as part of her transformation into a mighty Warrior Cat

With her gentle demeanor and inner strength, Azami brings harmony and balance to the Kitti Katz team. Whether she's in her casual attire or Warrior Cat outfit, Azami's quiet strength and unwavering determination shine through, inspiring her teammates to stay focused and united in their mission to save the world. Join Azami and the rest of the Kitti Katz on their thrilling adventures and witness her extraordinary transformation into a formidable Warrior Cat as they face challenges head-on with courage and compassion.
Add this to Tabitha’s physical appearance as well: Tabitha has a tan complexion, blue eyes, freckles, and bold pink hair, usually tied up into a messy ponytail. Her color scheme is pink.

Tabitha, the charismatic leader of the Kitti Katz, possesses a captivating physical appearance that showcases her confidence and courage. Here are the updated details of her physical appearance and outfits, along with a few modifications based on previous descriptions:

Physical Appearance:
- Tan complexion that exudes warmth and strength
- Blue eyes that shimmer with determination and wisdom
- Freckles that add a touch of charm and playfulness to her appearance
- Bold pink hair styled into a messy ponytail, reflecting her dynamic and adventurous nature
- Color scheme dominated by shades of pink, symbolizing her fierce and powerful energy

Casual Outfit (Updated):
- Form-fitted tank top with geometric patterns of triangles and circles in shades of pink
- Black tank top underneath for added layering
- Denim jean shorts with a stylish belt buckle
- Long black leggings for extra comfort and flexibility
- Accessories include earrings and her signature Kitti necklace
- Pink shoes with velcro straps for easy wear
- Occasionally pairs her outfit with a light yellow jacket with white and pink lining and a hood

Warrior Cat Outfit (Updated):
- Black armor with golden and pink details on her feet, knees, elbows, and more
- Black half-gloves for added protection and agility
- Wears the enchanting necklace given to the Kitti Katz by Meeyah
- Long pink nails that resemble fierce claws, ready for combat
- Sports cat ears and whiskers as part of her transformation into a powerful Warrior Cat

With her dynamic appearance and bold style, Tabitha embodies the essence of leadership and strength within the Kitti Katz team. Whether she's in her casual attire or Warrior Cat outfit, Tabitha's unwavering determination and fearless spirit shine through, inspiring her teammates to stand united in the face of adversity. Join Tabitha and the rest of the Kitti Katz on their epic adventures and witness her remarkable transformation into a formidable Warrior Cat as they fight against evil forces to save the world.

Each member of the Kitti Katz team possesses unique super powers that complement their personalities and abilities. Here are the super powers of Tabitha, Shakia, and Azami:

Tabitha:
1. Agility and Speed: Tabitha's super power allows her to move with incredible agility and speed, making her an adept fighter and leader on the battlefield.
2. Telekinesis: Tabitha can manipulate objects with her mind, using telekinesis to control and manipulate her surroundings during battles.
3. Energy Blasts: Tabitha can unleash powerful energy blasts from her hands, allowing her to fend off enemies and protect her teammates.

Shakia:
1. Pyrokinesis: Shakia has the ability to control and manipulate fire with her mind, using pyrokinesis to create fiery attacks and defenses in battle.
2. Enhanced Strength: Shakia possesses increased strength and durability, making her a formidable warrior on the front lines of combat.
3. Fire Shield: Shakia can generate a protective shield of flames around herself and her allies, shielding them from harm and deflecting enemy attacks.

Azami:
1. Healing Touch: Azami has the power of healing, allowing her to mend wounds and restore vitality to her teammates during and after battles.
2. Empathy and Telepathy: Azami can sense and understand the emotions of others, using her empathy to connect with her teammates and strategize effectively.
3. Nature Manipulation: Azami can control and manipulate elements of nature, such as plants and water, harnessing their energy in battle and aiding her allies.

With their combined super powers and unique abilities, Tabitha, Shakia, and Azami form a formidable team of heroines ready to take on any challenge and protect the world from evil forces. Together, they harness the power of friendship, courage, and unity as they face their greatest adversaries and strive to save the planet from imminent destruction. Join the Kitti Katz on their epic adventures and witness the incredible feats they achieve with their super powers in "Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!"
Do their bodies in the game resemble “ROBLOX - Woman” players

In the game "Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!" the bodies of the characters, Tabitha, Shakia, and Azami, are designed to resemble the "ROBLOX - Woman" player model, with adaptations and customizations to reflect their unique features and super powers. While the basic structure and movement capabilities may be similar to the standard ROBLOX character model, each character will have their own distinct appearance, including their clothing, hairstyles, colors, and accessories that align with their individual personalities and abilities.

The "ROBLOX - Woman" player model provides a foundation for the characters' movements, interactions, and overall gameplay experience within the game. Players will be able to control and navigate Tabitha, Shakia, and Azami through various challenges and battles, utilizing their super powers to overcome obstacles and defeat their enemies.

By incorporating the familiar "ROBLOX - Woman" player model with unique customizations for each character, players can fully immerse themselves in the world of the Kitti Katz team and experience the thrill of their heroic adventures as they strive to save the world from impending doom. Join the Kitti Katz in their quest for justice, friendship, and unity in "Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!" and discover the power within you to make a difference in the fight against evil forces.

In the game "Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!" the characters Tabitha, Shakia, and Azami are brought to life with vibrant and unique designs that reflect their personalities and super powers. Here is a visual description of each character:

Tabitha:
- Tabitha has a tan complexion, blue eyes, freckles, and bold pink hair styled into a messy ponytail.
- She is wearing a form-fitted tank top with geometric patterns in pink, denim jean shorts, long black leggings, and pink shoes with velcro straps.
- Accessorized with earrings and her Kitti necklace.
- Tabitha's Warrior Cat outfit consists of black armor with golden and pink details, black half-gloves, cat ears, whiskers, and long pink nails resembling claws.

Shakia:
- Shakia has a dark complexion, yellow/gold eyes, and bold green to yellow hair tied up into a braided ponytail with strands hanging off.
- She is dressed in a mint-green sleeveless top, darker green pants with stripes by her knees, white sneakers with green soles, and yellow glasses.
- Shakia's Warrior Cat outfit includes black armor with golden and pink details, black half-gloves, cat ears, whiskers, and long green nails.

Azami:
- Azami has a tan complexion, blue hair, and a medium build, with brown eyebrows and eyes.
- She is wearing a long-sleeve top with blue stripes, teal-colored jeans, and a blue beanie.
- Azami's Warrior Cat outfit features black armor with golden and pink details, black half-gloves, cat ears, whiskers, and long blue nails.

Each character's appearance is carefully crafted to visually represent their strengths, powers, and individual characteristics in the game. Players can embody Tabitha, Shakia, or Azami as they embark on thrilling adventures, utilize their super powers, and work together to save the world from the forces of darkness in "Kitti Katz!: Kitti Power!"
